doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: Document cites real statutes and cases but misrepresents Jones v. DeSantis holding—that case actually struck down Florida's LFO requirement, yet this document asserts LFOs remain mandatory for voting eligibility.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 45
REASON: The document mixes authentic Florida law references (Amendment 4, SB 7066, Jones v. DeSantis) with language that overstates the legal requirements in ways that contradict the actual court rulings and statutory interpretation.
